'''yadoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobhunting|jobhunting]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobhunting|jobhunting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yadoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædereth|yædereth]] || [[word:yæderej|yæderej]] || [[word:yæderesh|yæderesh]] || [[word:yædere|yædere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadodoroth|yadodoroth]] || [[word:yadodoroj|yadodoroj]] || [[word:yadodorosh|yadodorosh]] || [[word:yadodoro|yadodoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadoroth|yadoroth]] || [[word:yadoroj|yadoroj]] || [[word:yadorosh|yadorosh]] || [[word:yadoro|yadoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadofrofth|yadofrofth]] || [[word:yadofrofj|yadofrofj]] || [[word:yadofrofsh|yadofrofsh]] || [[word:yadofrof|yadofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yadorotho|yadorotho]] || [[word:yadorojo|yadorojo]] || [[word:yadorosho|yadorosho]] || [[word:yadoroko|yadoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yadoroth|yadoroth]] || [[word:yadoroj|yadoroj]] || [[word:yadorosh|yadorosh]] || [[word:yadoro|yadoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yadorothol|yadorothol]] || [[word:yadorojol|yadorojol]] || [[word:yadoroshol|yadoroshol]] || [[word:yadorokol|yadorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yadoroothotho|yadoroothotho]] || [[word:yadoroojojo|yadoroojojo]] || [[word:yadorooshosho|yadorooshosho]] || [[word:yadorooko|yadorooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yadorothon|yadorothon]] || [[word:yadorojon|yadorojon]] || [[word:yadoroshon|yadoroshon]] || [[word:yadorokon|yadorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yadorothooro|yadorothooro]] || [[word:yadorojooro|yadorojooro]] || [[word:yadoroshooro|yadoroshooro]] || [[word:yadorokooro|yadorokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
